description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Cold, Concentrate, Occult

You release a wave of underworld cold, chilling enemies to their very souls. All creatures within 20 feet must attempt a Fortitude save (DC 10 + your level + your Charisma modifier).

ResultEffect
Critical SuccessNo effect
SuccessHalf damage (4d8 cold)
FailureFull damage (4d8 cold) and Slowed 1 for 1 round
Critical FailureDouble damage (8d8 cold), Slowed 1 for 1 minute, and Drained 1

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
